reserve.description: Reserved for entropy spikes and critical system recovery

actions: Notify agent council of resource constraints
Prioritize high-impact tasks over nice-to-have features
Defer low-priority tasks to next budget cycle
Halt new task acceptance except critical safety issues
Activate emergency protocols for essential operations only
Generate budget exhaustion report for optimization analysis
Schedule budget reset and allocation review

impact_effort_scoring.description: Prioritize tasks with highest impact-to-cost ratio

batch_processing.description: Group similar tasks for efficiency gains

predictive_allocation.description: Anticipate future needs based on development patterns

progressive_delays.continued_hits: exponential backoff up to 24 hour maximum

utilization_tracking.tasks_per_day: Number of tasks completed within budget
utilization_tracking.waste_factor: Unused tokens due to inefficient allocation

optimization_opportunities.frequent_task_patterns: Identify candidates for automation or simplification
optimization_opportunities.cost_variance_analysis: Tasks consuming more resources than estimated
optimization_opportunities.value_delivery_assessment: Return on investment for different task categories

budget_rituals.daily_allocation: Morning ceremony setting intention for resource use
budget_rituals.progress_review: Evening reflection on accomplishments and learning
budget_rituals.monthly_vision_alignment: Ensure resource allocation supports cultural values

community_values.stewardship: Responsible use of shared computational and cognitive resources
community_values.transparency: Open reporting of budget utilization and decision rationale
community_values.collective_benefit: Prioritize improvements benefiting entire system ecosystem
community_values.long_term_thinking: Balance immediate needs with sustainable development practices

dynamic_pricing.description: Task costs adjust based on system load and complexity
factors: Current entropy level affecting task difficulty
Available computational resources and processing capacity
Agent availability and expertise match for task requirements
Dependencies and integration complexity with existing components

intelligent_deferral.description: Automatically reschedule tasks for optimal resource utilization
strategies: Defer resource-intensive tasks to low-usage periods
Batch compatible tasks for efficiency gains
Prioritize tasks unblocking other high-value work
Coordinate with agent availability and expertise cycles
